Deprecated API

Contents

  • Classes
  • Fields
  • Methods
  • Constructors
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    com.github.javaparser.printer.configuration.PrettyPrinterConfiguration
    This class could be removed in a future version. Use default DefaultPrinterConfiguration.
    com.github.javaparser.printer.lexicalpreservation.PhantomNodeLogic
    This class is no longer used phantom node are now an attribute of each node
    com.github.javaparser.printer.PrettyPrinter
    This class could be removed in a future version. Use default DefaultPrettyPrinter.
    com.github.javaparser.printer.PrettyPrintVisitor
    This class is no longer acceptable to use because it is not sufficiently configurable and it is too tied to a specific implementation. This class could be removed in a future version. Use default DefaultPrettyPrinterVisitor.
  • Fields
    Field
    Description
    com.github.javaparser.ast.Node.ABSOLUTE_BEGIN_LINE
    Use Position.ABSOLUTE_BEGIN_LINE
    com.github.javaparser.ast.Node.ABSOLUTE_END_LINE
    Use Position.ABSOLUTE_END_LINE
    com.github.javaparser.utils.Utils.EOL
    New code should use LineSeparator.SYSTEM if referring to the current host system's line separator, else LineSeparator.CR or LineSeparator.LF or LineSeparator.CRLF if referring to a specific style of line separator.
    com.github.javaparser.utils.Utils.SYSTEM_EOL
    Renamed from Utils.EOL to make it explicit that we're using the system's line separator. New code should use LineSeparator.SYSTEM if referring to the current host system's line separator, else LineSeparator.CR or LineSeparator.LF or LineSeparator.CRLF if referring to a specific style of line separator.
  • Methods
    Method
    Description
    com.github.javaparser.ast.CompilationUnit.getComments()
    getComments was a too generic name and it could be confused with getComment or getAllContainedComments Use CompilationUnit.getAllComments() instead
    com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.IntegerLiteralExpr.asInt()
    This function has issues with corner cases, such as 2147483648, so please use IntegerLiteralExpr.asNumber(). It will be made private or merged with IntegerLiteralExpr.asNumber() in future releases
    com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.IntegerLiteralExpr.setInt​(int)
    This function is deprecated in favor of LiteralStringValueExpr.setValue(String). Please refer to the IntegerLiteralExpr.asNumber() function for valid formats and how to construct literals holding negative values.
    com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.LongLiteralExpr.asLong()
    This function has issues with corner cases, such as 9223372036854775808L, so please use LongLiteralExpr.asNumber(). It will be made private or merged with LongLiteralExpr.asNumber() in future releases
    com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.LongLiteralExpr.setLong​(long)
    This function is deprecated in favor of LiteralStringValueExpr.setValue(String). Please refer to the LongLiteralExpr.asNumber() function for valid formats and how to construct literals holding negative values.
    com.github.javaparser.ast.Node.getChildNodesByType​(Class<N>)
    use Node.findAll(Class) but be aware that findAll also considers the initial node.
    com.github.javaparser.ast.Node.getNodesByType​(Class<N>)
    use Node.findAll(Class) but be aware that findAll also considers the initial node.
    com.github.javaparser.ast.nodeTypes.NodeWithExtends.addExtends​(Class<?>)
    use addExtendedType
    com.github.javaparser.ast.nodeTypes.NodeWithExtends.addExtends​(String)
    use addExtendedType
    com.github.javaparser.ast.nodeTypes.NodeWithImplements.addImplements​(Class<?>)
    use addImplementedType instead
    com.github.javaparser.ast.nodeTypes.NodeWithImplements.addImplements​(String)
    use addImplementedType instead
    com.github.javaparser.ast.nodeTypes.NodeWithRange.containsWithin​(Node)
    use NodeWithRange.containsWithinRange(Node) instead.
    com.github.javaparser.JavaParser.parse​(File, Charset)
    set the encoding in the ParserConfiguration
    com.github.javaparser.JavaParser.parse​(Path, Charset)
    set the encoding in the ParserConfiguration
    com.github.javaparser.JavaParser.parseResource​(ClassLoader, String, Charset)
    set the encoding in the ParserConfiguration
    com.github.javaparser.JavaParser.parseResource​(String, Charset)
    set the encoding in the ParserConfiguration
    com.github.javaparser.Position.pos​(int, int)
    Use the constructor (e.g. new Position(line, column))
    com.github.javaparser.printer.configuration.PrettyPrinterConfiguration.getIndent()
    (@see Indentation.getIndent())
    com.github.javaparser.printer.configuration.PrettyPrinterConfiguration.getIndentSize()
    (@see Indentation.size)
    com.github.javaparser.printer.configuration.PrettyPrinterConfiguration.getIndentType()
    (@see Indentation.type)
    com.github.javaparser.printer.configuration.PrettyPrinterConfiguration.getTabWidth()
    (@see Indentation.size)
    com.github.javaparser.printer.configuration.PrettyPrinterConfiguration.setIndentSize​(int)
    (@see Indentation.size())
    com.github.javaparser.printer.configuration.PrettyPrinterConfiguration.setIndentType​(Indentation.IndentType)
    (@see Indentation.type())
    com.github.javaparser.printer.configuration.PrettyPrinterConfiguration.setTabWidth​(int)
    (@see Indentation.size)
    com.github.javaparser.printer.PrettyPrintVisitor.getSource()
    use toString()
    com.github.javaparser.printer.SourcePrinter.getSource()
    use toString()
    com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser.parse​(File, Charset)
    set the encoding in the ParserConfiguration
    com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser.parse​(InputStream, Charset)
    set the encoding in the ParserConfiguration
    com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser.parse​(Path, Charset)
    set the encoding in the ParserConfiguration
    com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser.parseResource​(ClassLoader, String, Charset)
    set the encoding in the ParserConfiguration
    com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser.parseResource​(String, Charset)
    set the encoding in the ParserConfiguration
    com.github.javaparser.TokenTypes.isSpaceOrTab​(int)
    Use TokenTypes.isWhitespaceButNotEndOfLine(int) which more explicitly reflects that this also includes other whitespace e.g. EOF and CTRL_Z and a large number of other characters. See the grammar for details of exactly which characters are included as a "space" (. 
    
   <SPACE: [" ", "\t", "\f", "", " ", " ", "᠎", " ", " ", " ", " ", " ", " ",
       " ", " ", " ", " ", " ", "​", "‌", "‍", " ", " ", " ", " ", "⁠", "　", "﻿"]>
    com.github.javaparser.utils.Utils.toCamelCase​(String)
    use screamingToCamelCase
  • Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.IntegerLiteralExpr​(int)
    This function is deprecated in favor of IntegerLiteralExpr(String). Please refer to the IntegerLiteralExpr.asNumber() function for valid formats and how to construct literals holding negative values.
    com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.LongLiteralExpr​(long)
    This function is deprecated in favor of LongLiteralExpr(String). Please refer to the LongLiteralExpr.asNumber() function for valid formats and how to construct literals holding negative values.
    com.github.javaparser.ast.type.ClassOrInterfaceType​(String)
    use JavaParser.parseClassOrInterfaceType instead. This constructor does not understand generics.
    com.github.javaparser.StreamProvider​(InputStream, String)
